headline: Shea Charles
body: Exclusive: Fulham and Crystal Palace have entered the race for Shea Charles. Leeds have already had two bids rejected, which fell well below Saints’ valuation.😇 🤝 alex_crook
raw_text:

Leeds have already had two bids rejected, which fell well below Saints’ valuation.😇

🤝 @alex_crook
